urls.title: LinkedIn Company or Profile URLs
urls.description: LinkedIn company or profile URLs to scrape posts from. E.g. https://www.linkedin.com/company/google/ or https://www.linkedin.com/in/satyanadella/

limit.title: Posts per URL
limit.description: Maximum number of posts to scrape per URL.

li_at.title: LinkedIn li_at cookie (optional)
li_at.description: Optional. Provides more post URNs. Find in DevTools > Application > Cookies > linkedin.com.

proxy.title: Proxy configuration
proxy.description: Optional. Try without proxy first — company pages are public.
